case_title: BRADFORD FOO VS. GNZ, LLC DBA CASA MELISSA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ZAHID SHAIKH FILED BY DEFENDANT GNZ, LLC DBA CASA MELISSA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-17-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BRADFORD FOO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GNZ, LLC DBA CASA MELISSA IS PRESENT. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT IS ZAHID SHAIKH. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOO, BRADFORD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GNZ, LLC DBA CASA MELISSA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,600.00 FILED BY FOO, BRADFORD AS TO DEFENDANT GNZ, LLC DBA CASA MELISSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-02-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOO, BRADFORD ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) SERVED JUL-18-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GNZ, LLC DBA CASA MELISSA
AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) SERVED JUL-18-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GNZ, LLC DBA CASA MELISSA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-02-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-07-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT HAS A NON ACTIVE STATUS AND WAITING ORDER FROM THE FRANCHISE TAX BOARD. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BRADFORD FOO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GNZ, LLC DBA CASA MELISSA IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: NON ACTIVE STATUS
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GNZ, LLC DBA CASA MELISSA
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR ZAHID SHAIKH FILED BY DEFENDANT GNZ, LLC DBA CASA MELISSA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-17-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 09/23/2025. SMASLL CLAIMS-CONTINUED ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER NOSUCH STREET UNABLE TO FORWARD)
